creator: zlei@FreeBSD.org
text:
For
> Hi, may you please also share the exact version?
I meant the version on which you get kernel panic.

BTW, if you redo upgrading, it is possible that you upgrade to a newer version ( different patch level, aka FreeBSD 14.1-pN ) . If the kernel panics again you may get similar but different stack trace, so do not hesitate to report again.
